title: Slut or Nut: The Diary of a Rape Trial
original_title: Slut or Nut: The Diary of a Rape Trial
overview: York University alumni Mandi Gray is forced to grapple with a university administration, legal system and police force unwilling to take seriously her report of rape by a fellow PhD student.
